author.bio: Imperfect member of the restored Church of Jesus Christ. M.S. CS. @caddyserver & @relicabackup. Downvoted for opinions. Comes in second place, every time.
author.name: 🧗‍♂️ Matt Holt

content.text:
A wild /usr/lib/go-1.13 appeared! Seriously, where did it come from? Why is it here, and only in @code's Terminal? Ubuntu 20.04... first thing I did was install #golang 1.15 manually, why did it need Go 1.13??

(Never had this problem on Mac. ... but had lots of other problems)
